# Don of Detail

> Reno's premier mobile auto detailing service. Ceramic coating, paint correction, interior & exterior detailing for cars, boats & RVs. We come to you. 80+ five-star Google reviews.

## About

Don of Detail LLC is a fully mobile auto detailing company based in Reno, Nevada. We bring professional-grade detailing directly to your home or office - no shop visit needed. Owned and operated locally, we specialize in ceramic coatings, multi-stage paint correction, and full interior & exterior details designed for Reno's harsh high-desert climate (intense UV, desert dust, and road salt from Tahoe trips).

## Services

- Interior Detail: full vacuum, steam clean, leather conditioning, odor removal, pet hair extraction
- Exterior Detail: hand wash, clay bar decontamination, machine polish, sealant, deionized water rinse
- Interior & Exterior Detail: comprehensive full vehicle detail combining both services
- Ceramic Coating: professional-grade coating for UV protection, hydrophobic defense, and long-term gloss (2–5 year durability)
- Paint Correction: multi-stage machine polishing to remove swirl marks, scratches, and oxidation
- Boat Detailing: hull cleaning, oxidation removal, waxing, and interior deep clean
- RV & Travel Trailer Detailing: exterior wash, roof treatment, interior deep clean, ceramic coating
- Headlight Restoration: remove yellowing and hazing for improved clarity and safety
- Engine Bay Detailing: safe degreasing and dressing for a clean engine compartment

## Service Area

Reno, Sparks, Spanish Springs, South Meadows, Montrêux, Verdi, Sun Valley, Washoe Valley, Fernley, Dayton, Carson City, and all of Northern Nevada.

## Hours

Open 7 days a week, 8:00 AM – 7:00 PM
